message.content:
@startuml
participant RtpSenderEgress
participant ModuleRtpRtcpImpl
participant PacketRouter
participant ProcessThreadImpl
participant PacingController
participant PacedSender
participant RTPSender
participant RTPSenderAudio
participant AudioCodingModuleImpl
participant ChannelReceive
participant ChannelSend
participant AcmReceiver
participant AudioSendStream
participant AudioMixerImpl
participant AudioTransportImpl
participant AudioDeviceBuffer
participant AudioTrackJni
participant AudioRecordJni

AudioRecordJni -> AudioRecordJni : DataIsRecorded()
AudioRecordJni -> AudioTrackJni : DeliverRecordedData()
AudioTrackJni -> AudioDeviceBuffer : RecordedDataIsAvailable()
AudioDeviceBuffer -> AudioTransportImpl : SendAudioData()
AudioTransportImpl -> AudioSendStream : ProcessAndEncodeAudio()
AudioSendStream -> AudioCodingModuleImpl : Add10MsData()
AudioCodingModuleImpl -> AudioCodingModuleImpl : Encode()
AudioCodingModuleImpl -> ChannelSend : SendData()
ChannelSend -> ChannelSend : SendRtpAudio()
ChannelSend -> AudioSendStream : SendAudio()
AudioSendStream -> PacedSender : SendToNetwork()
PacedSender -> PacedSender : EnqueuePackets()
ProcessThreadImpl -> PacingController : Process()
PacingController -> PacedSender : Process()
PacedSender -> PacedSender : ProcessPackets()
PacedSender -> PacedSender : SendRtpPacket()
PacedSender -> RTPSender : SendPacket()
RTPSender -> PacketRouter : TrySendPacket()
PacketRouter -> ModuleRtpRtcpImpl : SendPacket()
ModuleRtpRtcpImpl -> RtpSenderEgress : SendPacketToNetwork()
RtpSenderEgress -> RtpSenderEgress
@enduml
